---

**FROM:** facilities-london@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** 15 MAR 2024 09:23
**SUBJECT:** Fridge Cleaning Schedule

Hi Team,

Just a reminder that the break room fridge will be cleaned out this Friday afternoon. Please remove any personal items by 4 PM. Last week we had to bin approximately 8 yogurts and some unidentifiable leftover containers. Let's keep it tidy!

Cheers,
Linda (Facilities)

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com

Tom,

Your overtime for last week looks good. Just need signatures from both you and your supervisor before I can process it. See me when you get a chance.

Thanks,
Sharon (HR)

---

**FROM:** purchasing@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** 17 MAR 2024 11:04

The bulk order of printer cartridges should arrive Tuesday morning. Please ensure someone is here to sign for delivery. They'll need to go to the 4th floor supply closet.

Cheers,
Marcus

---

**FROM:** security@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** 18 MAR 2024 08:47

Security Team

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.com

**DATE:** 19 MAR 2024 16:32

Tom

---

**FROM:** facilities-london@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** 20 MAR 2024 13:19
**SUBJECT:** Lift Maintenance - Floors 1-10

Scheduled lift maintenance on the north-side lift bank Friday 22 March, 6 PM-8 PM. Please use south-side lifts. Should cause minimal disruption.

Linda (Facilities)

---

**FROM:** admin@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** 21 MAR 2024 10:56
**SUBJECT:** Staff Parking - Monthly Reminders

This month's parking validation slips are attached. Please ensure all staff complete the sign-out sheet in the lobby before leaving. We've had several unpaid parking violations this quarter.

Administration

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**Email Archive - Floor 1**
**Date Range: March 2024 - April 2024**

---

**FROM:** facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** March 15, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Printer Cartridge Order - Please Confirm Receipt

Hi Team,

Just wanted to check that everyone received the new HP toner cartridges delivered last Tuesday? We ordered the black ones in bulk again this quarter. Please make sure they're stored properly in the supply cabinet and not left near the loading dock.

Also, if anyone has damaged equipment that needs replacing, submit requests through the usual channels.

Cheers,
Marcus

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** postal-supervisor@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** March 22, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Delivery Schedule This Week

Hi Sarah,

Standard courier schedule for this week:
- Monday: Royal Mail bulk sorting (usual time)
- Wednesday: DPD parcel collection (2pm)
- Friday: Interparcel pickup

I'll be on shift Monday-Wednesday. Dave's covering Thursday-Friday. A few personal packages coming in for staff—nothing unusual. I've noted them in the log as always.

Thanks,
Tom

---

**FROM:** hr@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** all-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** April 2, 2024
**SUBJECT:** April Staff Newsletter - Wellness Program Update

Dear Pinnacle Team,

This month we're highlighting our updated wellness benefits. The new gym partnership at the leisure center on Threadneedle Street now offers 25% discounts. Enrollment closes April 15th.

Also reminder: Staff ID badges must be worn at all times in the building. Security has been strict lately about this on the upper floors.

Best,
Human Resources

---

**FROM:** maintenance@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** April 8, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Locker Maintenance - Floor 3 Scheduled

All,

We'll be doing routine maintenance on the staff lockers on Floor 3 next Monday (April 15th) between 9am-12pm. Please remove any personal items beforehand or let us know if you need access. We're just checking hinges and replacing damaged locks.

If anyone has keys that aren't working, now's the time to report them.

Maintenance Team

---

**FROM:** security@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** building-managers@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** April 10, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Updated Sign-In Procedures - Visitor Log

Managers,

Following the quarterly security audit, we're asking all departments to remind visiting couriers and delivery personnel about the sign-in book procedures in their respective areas. The mailroom sign-in has been particularly inconsistent.

Anyone entering should log their name, time, and purpose. It's quick and helps us maintain proper records for insurance purposes.

Thanks for your cooperation.
Security

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** dave.morrison@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** April 12, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Handover Notes - Friday Shift

Dave,

Just the usual stuff this Friday. Few packages for reception, standard mail sorting. One larger delivery coming in around 3pm from a specialist art supplier—frames or something for one of the offices upstairs, I think. Nothing heavy.

The loading dock should be clear by then. Log everything as usual.

See you Monday.
Tom

---

**FROM:** reception@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** April 18, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Visitor Badges

Hi,

Can we get some temporary visitor badges printed? We've had a few contractors coming through and they keep forgetting to sign in properly. Just want to make the process smoother.

Thanks,
Claire

---

**END OF DOCUMENT**

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**Email Distribution Log - Week of March 11-15**

---

**FROM:** Tom Hartley (Mailroom Supervisor)
**TO:** Building Services Team
**DATE:** March 12, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Weekly Delivery Summary & Courier Issues

Hi all,

Just flagging a few logistical notes from this week's mail operations:

**Courier Performance:**
- DPD arrived late Tuesday (weather on M25, apparently)
- Hermes had another damaged parcel - floor 34, Legal Department. They're filing a complaint with the carrier
- Royal Mail volume up 12% this week. Spring marketing campaigns, I expect.

**Locker Maintenance:**
- Lockers 3A-3F need servicing. Hinges sticking. Facilities, can you get someone down?
- 7B is temporarily out of order - lock mechanism broken. Redirected contents to 7C.

**Returned Mail:**
- 15 items address unknown - forwarded to central processing
- Parkside Consulting (Floor 28) - their old tenant still receiving mail. Tagged for return to sender.

**Note on Procedures:**
Can the reception team remind visitors about the sign-in book? Yesterday had at least 3 people go straight through without checking in. Creates a security gap. Building Management is apparently running an audit.

Also, anyone know why we've got such high volume going to the executive floors lately? Probably just the quarterly reports.

Cheers,
Tom

---

**FROM:** Angela Chen (Reception)
**TO:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** March 13, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Weekly Delivery Summary

Tom,

Re: the sign-in book - will chase it up. Though honestly, half our regulars don't bother and I'm not paid enough to be the sign-in police.

On the locker 7B issue - maintenance logged it last week too. We really need to budget for a full locker replacement. These are ancient.

Also, do we still need to keep courier manifest copies? Seems like paperwork for paperwork's sake. IT says we should digitize everything but I'm not holding my breath.

—A

---

**INTERNAL MEMO**

**TO:** Mailroom Staff
**FROM:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** March 14, 2024
**RE:** Easter Holiday Cover

Just a reminder: we're closed Good Friday and Easter Monday. Anyone volunteering for the skeleton crew? Double pay, obviously. Need 2 people minimum for package sorting.

Let me know ASAP.

Best,

Package volume remains consistent with seasonal trends.

Tom

Need to place next order by EOD tomorrow.

**FROM:** Building Security

Coordinating an external courier training session in Conference Room B (Floor 2) on March 21st, 2:00 PM. Three vendors will be visiting. Will send badging details separately. Please ensure mailroom is staffed that afternoon in case they need to reference our facilities.

Security Office

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**Internal Email Archive - Floor 1**

---

**FROM:** margaret.chen@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 14 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Revised Coffee Rota - April Schedule

Hi all,

Following last month's complaints about the coffee machine being empty during afternoon shifts, we're implementing a new rota. Please see attached spreadsheet. Tom, you're down for Wednesdays and Fridays. Sarah, Mondays and Thursdays. 

Also, the supplier is discontinuing our usual Kenyan blend, so we'll be trying a new Brazilian roast starting next week. Let me know if anyone has allergies or preferences.

The old machine is being replaced 23rd April - there may be temporary disruption.

Cheers,
Margaret (Facilities)

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** margaret.chen@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 15 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Revised Coffee Rota - April Schedule

Margaret,

Fridays work fine. Quick question - will the new machine take the old pods or do we need to stock different ones? Also, can we order more cups? We keep running short.

Tom

---

**FROM:** david.morrison@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 18 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Package Insurance Claims - Quarterly Review

Team,

I'm reviewing our insurance paperwork for Q1. Please confirm all damaged deliveries from your shift logs so I can file claims. We had roughly 7-8 items flagged, mostly from courier handling.

Don't forget to photo-document any visible damage before signing off.

David (Admin)

---

**FROM:** sarah.okonkwo@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 20 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Late Deliveries Thursday

Tom,

Were you the one who signed in the Parcelforce shipment around 4:30pm Thursday? I'm trying to track a missing invoice from Huntsman & Associates. DHL says they delivered it, but I can't find it in the afternoon log.

Can you check your notes?

Sarah

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** sarah.okonkwo@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 20 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Late Deliveries Thursday

Sarah,

Thursday was my day off - might've been the temp agency cover (Jason?). I can't remember if he left notes. Try checking with Margaret.

Tom

---

**FROM:** margaret.chen@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 22 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Health & Safety Notice - Floor 1 Refresh

Team,

The lobby entrance is being repainted 25-26 March. Access via side entrance (Harrington Street) during those days. Security will be notified. No major disruption expected.

Also, reminder: all personal items left in lockers beyond 30 days will be cleared out. Please collect anything you need to keep.

Margaret

---

**FROM:** david.morrison@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** margaret.chen@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 24 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Locker 7A Maintenance Request

Margaret,

Locker 7A lock is jammed. Can maintenance come check it? It's been stuck for weeks and blocking access. Not urgent, but whenever they have time.

David

---

**FROM:** margaret.chen@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** david.morrison@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 24 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Locker 7A Maintenance Request

David,

I'll log it with the help desk. Might take a few days - they're backed up with the renovation work upstairs.

In the meantime, remind people to keep lockers cleared anyway per the notice I sent.

Margaret

---

**FROM:** sarah.okonkwo@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 27 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Courier Account Updates

All,

Just received notice that DHL is changing their account manager - our new contact is Richard Watts (r.watts@dhl.co.uk). If you process deliveries, update your contact lists.

Also, Huntsman & Associates called - they never actually sent that invoice I mentioned. It was a database error on their end. Mystery solved!

Sarah

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**Email Archive - Floor 1**
**Date Range: March 1-15, 2024**

---

**FROM:** facilities@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom.staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 3, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Refrigerator Maintenance Schedule

Please note that the break room refrigerator will be serviced on Wednesday, March 6th between 2-3 PM. Please remove any perishable items by end of business Tuesday. The unit has been making unusual noises lately and maintenance believes it's just the compressor cycling normally, but we want to be safe.

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** logistics.coordinator@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 5, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Weekly Supply Order

Tom, the printer paper shipment arrived but it was the wrong ream size. Can you contact the vendor and request the standard A4 boxes we usually order? Also, we're running low on packaging tape again. Please add 6 rolls to next week's supply order.

Thanks,
Sarah

---

**FROM:** hr.benefits@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** all.staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 7, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Updated Parking Validation Procedures

As of March 15th, all parking validation requests must be submitted through the new online portal. Paper forms will no longer be accepted. IT will be sending login credentials to all departments by March 12th. If you don't receive yours, contact the helpdesk.

---

**FROM:** building.security@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** reception.team@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 10, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Sign-In Log Audit Reminder

This is a routine reminder to ensure all visitors sign in at the ground floor reception before proceeding to their designated floors. The sign-in book is mandatory for all non-badged personnel. Please ensure visitors are directed appropriately and that the log is filled out completely with time-in and time-out.

---

**FROM:** maintenance.requests@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom.staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 12, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Locker Inspection - Floor 3 Storage Area

Routine maintenance inspection of floor 3 storage lockers will occur on March 18th. This is standard annual inspection to check for rust, water damage, and general upkeep. If you use any of these lockers, please ensure they are accessible and cleared of any personal items. Maintenance will need approximately 2 hours.

---

**FROM:** accounting@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 14, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Delivery Log Reconciliation - Q1

Hi Tom, Finance is doing their quarterly audit and needs clarification on several package entries from your delivery log. Can you provide invoices or receipts for deliveries marked as "Internal Transfer - Executive" from the past 6 weeks? Just need to match them against departmental budgets. Should be straightforward once we have the documentation.

---

**FROM:** it.support@pinnacletower.com
**TO:** mailroom.staff@pinnacletower.com
**DATE:** March 15, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Network Maintenance Notice

Network systems will undergo routine maintenance on Saturday, March 16th from 8 PM - 12 AM. All email services will be temporarily unavailable. Any urgent communications should be handled before the maintenance window.

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**EMAIL ARCHIVE - NOISE DOCUMENTS**
**Classification: General Correspondence**

---

**FROM:** facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 14 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Mailroom Supplies Restock - Action Required

Hi Tom,

We need to restock the following items by end of week:

- Parcel tape (brown, 48mm) - Order reference MT-447
- Thermal labels for printer - 4x4 stock
- Bubble wrap rolls (500mm width)
- Wooden pallets for loading area (approximately 8-10)

Please submit your requirements through the usual procurement portal. Budget code 2847-FM applies.

Thanks,
Martin

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 15 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Mailroom Supplies Restock - Action Required

Done. I've put in the order. We're also running low on the clipboards for sign-in - the ones with the attached pens keep going missing. Can we get 12 replacements?

Also, the scanner on dock 2 is acting up again. Makes this weird grinding noise before it reads barcodes. Worth getting someone to look at it?

Tom

---

**FROM:** hr@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 18 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Induction Schedule - April Placements

Tom,

We have three temporary staff coming in for the April roster:

- Sarah Chen (Admin support) - Start 1st April
- Marcus Williams (Package sorting) - Start 8th April  
- Rebecca Foster (Reception assist) - Start 15th April

Can you prepare the usual induction materials? They'll need access cards, locker assignments, and briefing on the delivery protocols.

The new uniforms should arrive by 25th March.

Cheers,
Christine

---

**FROM:** security@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 20 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Access Log Update

Tom,

Your security clearance has been renewed through Q2 2025. Your badge should still work on levels B1-3 and all service corridors as standard.

If you need access to any upper floor loading areas in future, just request it through the portal and we'll process it.

Best,
Security Team

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 21 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Dock 2 Scanner Issue - URGENT

Martin,

The scanner's definitely broken. It's not reading anything now. We've had to manually log six packages this morning. Can we get maintenance out here today? 

We're backed up.

Tom

---

**FROM:** maintenance@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 21 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Dock 2 Scanner Issue - URGENT

Scheduled for tomorrow 9am. Should be a quick fix - likely the laser needs recalibration.

---

**FROM:** catering@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** mailroom@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 24 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Coffee Machine Refund - March

Hi,

The coffee machine in your break room generated £47.60 in sales this month. Your share (30%) is £14.28. We'll credit it to the office kitty fund.

Enjoy the machine!

Catering Services

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** catering@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** 24 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Coffee Machine Refund - March

Cheers! That'll get us some proper biscuits instead of the custard creams.

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**NOISE_EMAILS**

---

**FROM:** Tom Hartley <t.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Mailroom Team
**DATE:** 15 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Delivery Log Updates & Summer Holiday Cover

Hi all,

Just a heads up that I'll be taking my summer holidays 19-26 August. Need someone to cover my shifts those weeks. Please let me know ASAP if you're available for extra hours. The overtime rates are decent.

Also, a few administrative updates:
- New delivery scanning system goes live next month. There'll be a training session Thursday at 2pm. Attendance mandatory.
- Stock of bubble mailers running low again. I've submitted a requisition but it's been pending for three weeks. If anyone sees the order come in, please store them in the back cabinet.
- The postage meter needs recalibrating. It's been slightly overcharging on international mail. I've flagged this to Facilities.

Cheers,
Tom

---

**FROM:** Facilities <facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 16 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Postage Meter – Service Request #7841

Hi Tom,

Thanks for reporting. We've logged this as Service Request #7841. The vendor will be contacted to schedule maintenance. Given current workload, expect the engineer within 2-3 weeks. 

In the meantime, please note any discrepancies in the logs.

Best,
Facilities Team

---

**FROM:** Sandra Mitchell <s.mitchell@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 17 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Lunch Plans?

Tom,

Fancy grabbing lunch at the café downstairs Friday? I'm thinking the chicken wrap. Let me know.

Sandra

---

**FROM:** Reception <reception@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Mailroom Team
**DATE:** 18 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Courier Delays – UPS & DPD

Team,

Just received notification that both UPS and DPD are experiencing delays across London due to vehicle availability. Estimated impact: 1-2 days on deliveries. Please manage customer expectations accordingly.

Cheers,
Reception

---

**FROM:** Tom Hartley <t.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Facilities
**DATE:** 20 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Postage Meter – Service Request #7841

Hi,

Just following up. The meter has now started double-charging on some parcels. This is costing the company money. Can you escalate to the vendor? The code is #7841 from my previous email.

Thanks,
Tom

---

**FROM:** HR <hr@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Mailroom Team
**DATE:** 21 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** Health & Safety Reminder – Lifting Procedures

Dear Team,

Following a recent audit, we're reminding everyone of correct lifting procedures for parcels over 15kg. Please ensure you're using the trolleys and asking for assistance when needed. Injuries in the mailroom this quarter have increased by 12%.

Full training materials are available on the intranet.

Regards,
HR Department

---

**FROM:** Tom Hartley <t.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Mailroom Team
**DATE:** 22 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** New Sign-In Protocol

Just a note – we're implementing a new sign-in system next month for all deliveries. Couriers will need to provide ID and sign digitally rather than the old paper log. This is for security reasons per Building Management.

More details to follow.

Tom

---

**FROM:** Sandra Mitchell <s.mitchell@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 22 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Lunch Plans?

Perfect! Friday works. See you at 12:30 by the café.

---

**FROM:** Facilities <facilities@pinnacletower.co.uk>
**TO:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 25 March 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Postage Meter – Service Request #7841

Hi Tom,

Engineer scheduled for 3 April. They'll need 2-3 hours to complete diagnostics and repair. Please ensure someone is available at the mailroom to grant access.

Cheers,
Facilities

---

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**EMAIL LOG - FLOOR 1 (G/0)**
**WEEK OF 14-18 NOVEMBER 2024**

---

**TO:** All Mailroom Staff
**FROM:** Susan Chen, Mailroom Supervisor
**DATE:** 14 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** Weekly Inventory & Schedule Updates

Team,

A few administrative notes for this week:

1. **Parcel Shelving** - We're expecting a delivery of new metal shelving units from OfficeMax on Wednesday. Tom will be coordinating with facilities to stage these in the loading area. The old shelving from the north wall will be removed Friday afternoon.

2. **Holiday Hours** - Reminder that we close at 4 PM on 22 November for the Thanksgiving holiday prep. All outbound packages must be processed by 3:30 PM that day.

3. **Courier Pickups** - FedEx pickup window has shifted from 3 PM to 2:45 PM starting Monday. Please ensure packages are staged accordingly.

4. **Equipment Maintenance** - The postage meter will be serviced on 15 November between 10-11 AM. Use the backup meter during this time.

5. **Training** - Reminder to all staff: new security badge readers have been installed at the south entrance. You'll need to tap twice—once at the outer door, once at the inner gate.

Please confirm receipt.

Susan

---

**TO:** mailroom@pinnacletower.co.uk
**FROM:** Facilities Management
**DATE:** 15 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** Access Card Reactivation Required

Several expired access cards have been flagged in our system. If you haven't had yours renewed in the past 18 months, please visit the security office on Floor 2 with two forms of ID.

Processing takes 10-15 minutes.

---

**TO:** Susan Chen
**FROM:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 16 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Weekly Inventory & Schedule Updates

Susan,

Got the memo. I'll coordinate the shelving install with facilities. 

Also, we've got quite a few inter-office mail batches backing up—legal dept seems to be running quarterly audits. I've got them sorted by floor destination, so should clear out most of that by end of week.

One thing: the loading dock door actuator is making a grinding noise again. Facilities put in a work order but wanted me to flag it.

Tom

---

**TO:** Mailroom Staff
**FROM:** HR Department
**DATE:** 17 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** Mandatory Safety Briefing - Please Respond

All staff required to attend a 20-minute safety briefing on heavy lifting procedures. 

Sessions available:
- Wednesday 14:00-14:20 (Conference Room 1C)
- Thursday 09:00-09:20 (Conference Room 1C)

Please reply with your preferred slot.

---

**TO:** Tom Hartley
**FROM:** Accounts Receivable (Floor 22)
**DATE:** 17 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** Missing Invoice Batch

Tom,

We're missing an invoice batch that should have been delivered Monday. It was labeled "AR-Weekly-Consolidation" and was in a standard manila envelope. Did it come through the mailroom?

Can you check the logs?

Thanks,
Margaret

---

**TO:** Margaret / Accounts Receivable
**FROM:** Tom Hartley
**DATE:** 17 November 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Missing Invoice Batch

Margaret,

Checked our logs and the delivery sign-in book. Nothing logged Monday under AR. Could've gotten mixed with the legal batch headed upstairs—those were voluminous this week. I'll keep an eye out and ping you if it surfaces.

Tom

---

**END DOCUMENT**

title: PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER MAILROOM**
**Email Log Extract - Week of March 10-14, 2024**

---

**From:** postal-services@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** mailroom-team@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Monday, March 11, 2024, 09:15 AM
**Subject:** Courier Collections Schedule - Week 1

Team,

Please note revised collection times for this week:

**DPD Collections:** 11:30 AM & 3:45 PM (Ground Floor)
**Royal Mail:** 12:00 PM & 4:00 PM (Ground Floor)
**Parcelforce:** 2:30 PM (Ground Floor)
**FedEx International:** 1:15 PM & 3:30 PM (Ground Floor)

Tom - please ensure all outbound items are manifested and ready 15 minutes before scheduled pickups. We've had two missed collections in February due to late preparation.

Also, the new barcode scanner needs calibration. IT should have sent through the technician details by end of business Friday.

Best,
Linda Mackenzie
Mailroom Supervisor

---

**From:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** postal-services@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Monday, March 11, 2024, 10:42 AM
**Subject:** RE: Courier Collections Schedule - Week 1

Linda,

Got it. I'll have everything ready. Quick question - do we still have the contract with that small courier outfit from last year? The one that picked up odd jobs? I've got someone asking about white-glove service deliveries but I want to make sure we're still approved vendors before I direct them.

Tom

---

**From:** postal-services@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Monday, March 11, 2024, 11:05 AM
**Subject:** RE: Courier Collections Schedule - Week 1

Tom,

We discontinued that contract in September. Stick with our standard carriers. If someone needs specialist services, tell them to submit a vendor request through procurement.

Linda

---

**From:** facilities-maintenance@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** mailroom-team@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Wednesday, March 13, 2024, 2:33 PM
**Subject:** Locker Inspection Schedule

Team,

Following the routine inventory audit, we'll be conducting a full inspection of the mailroom lockers (Floors 1-5) over the next two weeks. Each locker will be photographed and its contents logged.

**Floor 1 Mailroom:** March 18-19
**Floor 2 Storage:** March 20-21
**Floor 3 Locker Bank:** March 22-23
**Floor 4 Archive:** March 24
**Floor 5 Supplies:** March 25

Please ensure all personal items are removed beforehand. Any lockers that remain unclaimed after March 17 will be cleared and their contents placed in Lost & Found.

Regards,
Martin Webb
Facilities Manager

---

**From:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** linda.mackenzie@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Thursday, March 14, 2024, 4:22 PM
**Subject:** March Delivery Summary

Linda,

March totals attached. 247 inbound packages, 156 outbound. Standard distribution across floors 2-45, with the usual cluster of deliveries to Legal (Floor 28) and Finance (Floor 32).

One thing - we had 11 packages this month marked for "Floor 60+ Secure" with no specific department listed. Just says "Recipient: Administrator" and a PO number. Not sure if this is a new protocol or if someone's being vague in their ordering.

Should I flag these with Procurement or just process as normal?

Tom

---

**From:** linda.mackenzie@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Thursday, March 14, 2024, 5:18 PM
**Subject:** RE: March Delivery Summary

Tom,

Those should have department codes. Email whoever submitted the orders and ask for clarification. If they don't respond within 48 hours, hold them in the secure cache until we get proper authorization. Standard procedure.

Good catch on that.

L

---

**From:** postal-services@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** mailroom-team@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Friday, March 15, 2024, 9:00 AM
**Subject:** Mailroom Supplies Reorder

Hi All,

Reordering the following for April stock:

- Parcel tape (6 rolls) - **APPROVED**
- Printer ink cartridges - **APPROVED**
- Evidence bags (brown kraft, 6x9) - **PENDING**
- Plastic courier pouches - **APPROVED**
- Foam corner protectors - **APPROVED**

The evidence bags are awaiting Finance approval on the procurement code. I'll chase them up next week.

Also, someone left the back door propped open Thursday afternoon. Security reminder: DO NOT do this. The loading area is monitored but we still need to follow protocol. Use your key card to exit.

Linda

---

**From:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**To:** linda.mackenzie@pinnacletower.co.uk
**Date:** Friday, March 15, 2024, 3:45 PM
**Subject:** Out of Office - March 18-20

Linda,

Just confirming I'm approved for leave those three days (personal). Dave's covering deliveries. I've left him the schedule and the pending vendor clarification emails for those "Floor 60+" packages.

Back Monday.

Tom

---

**END OF EXTRACT**

**DATE:** January 15, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Printer Cartridge Order Status

Tom,

The replacement toner cartridges for the mailroom printer arrived this morning. They're in the cabinet by the sorting station. We went with the bulk order option this time—should last us through Q1 at least.

Also, the parcel scanner calibration is scheduled for Wednesday afternoon. IT says they need about 90 minutes. Let me know if that works with your schedule.

Cheers,
Marcus

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** facilities-mailroom@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** January 16, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Printer Cartridge Order Status

Works fine. I'll be here Wednesday. Just make sure they don't mess with the label settings—took me forever to get them properly aligned.

One more thing: can we order more padlocks for the lockers on level 3? At least two of them are sticking. Tenant complaints coming in.

Tom

---

**FROM:** marcus.powell@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** January 18, 2024
**SUBJECT:** Level 3 Lockers & Maintenance Request

Submitted the padlock order—should arrive by Friday. I'll tag it for priority. Facilities will swap them out next week.

Also got the January courier invoices through. Everything looks standard. DHL, Royal Mail, FedEx pickups all on schedule. Do you need the reports filed or should I keep them in the folder?

M

---

**FROM:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** marcus.powell@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** January 19, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Level 3 Lockers & Maintenance Request

File them away. Standard procedure. Let me know once the lockers are sorted—the building manager's been asking about access complaints.

Also—saw we're getting a delivery from Hawthorne Solutions tomorrow morning. Large, unmarked box. Standard handling, or anything special I should know about?

Tom

---

**FROM:** marcus.powell@pinnacletower.co.uk
**TO:** tom.hartley@pinnacletower.co.uk
**DATE:** January 19, 2024
**SUBJECT:** RE: Level 3 Lockers & Maintenance Request

No special instructions that I'm aware of. I'll keep an eye out for it. Just route it through normal intake if it checks out.

Cheers,
M

title: SUBJECT: Mailroom Equipment Maintenance Schedule - Q4 2024**
content:
**SUBJECT: Mailroom Equipment Maintenance Schedule - Q4 2024**

**FROM:** facilities@pinnaclemanagement.com
**TO:** mailroom-staff@pinnaclemanagement.com
**DATE:** 15 October 2024
**PRIORITY:** Low

---

Hi Team,

Just a reminder about our scheduled maintenance for Q4. Please see below:

**Franking Machine (Unit 3)** – Toner cartridge replacement scheduled for 22 October. The vendor will arrive between 10:00-11:30 AM. Please ensure someone is available to sign off.

**Mail Sorter Conveyor Belt** – Annual inspection on 5 November. May cause minor delays in morning distribution (est. 30 mins). Apologies in advance.

**Locker Bank Inventory** – We're conducting our annual audit of all mailroom lockers (including the old bank on floor 3) during the week of 12 November. If you have personal items stored, please collect them by 8 November. Anything remaining will be catalogued and held in storage.

**New Delivery Manifest System** – IT will be rolling out updates to the package tracking database. Training session scheduled for 18 October at 14:00 in Conference Room B (basement level). Attendance mandatory for all staff.

Also, has anyone seen the spare keys for the mail cart locks? We're down to one functional set and it's becoming a nuisance.

Please reply-all if you have any questions.

Cheers,
**Margaret Chen**
Facilities Coordinator
Pinnacle Tower, London

---

title: Patch: f001-patch-obj-001-1
content:
**INTEROFFICE MEMORANDUM**

TO: Tom Hartley, Mailroom Supervisor
FROM: Patricia Chen, Facilities Management
DATE: March 14, 2024
RE: Delivery Log Audit & Vendor Compliance Review

---

Tom,

Thank you for submitting the Q1 delivery logs for our routine audit. I've completed my initial review and have flagged several items requiring clarification.

**OUTSTANDING DISCREPANCIES:**

Over the past six weeks, we've processed 47 package deliveries addressed to floors 60+ that lack proper departmental authorization codes. Our records show these shipments originating from four entities not currently listed in our approved vendor database:

- Lazarus Medical Supply (10 shipments, Jan 22–Feb 28)
- Prometheus Biotech Solutions (8 shipments)
- Helix Logistics International (6 shipments)
- Cascade Equipment Co. (3 shipments)

**CRITICAL CONCERN:**

None of these vendors appear in our master procurement file. Lazarus Medical in particular sent six high-priority overnight deliveries to floors 60+ without corresponding purchase orders in Finance's system. When I contacted their listed phone number, the number was disconnected.

**ACTION REQUIRED:**

1. Cross-reference all floors 60+ recipient names with departmental rosters
2. Obtain signed receiving documentation for Lazarus Medical shipments
3. Flag any future deliveries from unapproved_vendors pending Procurement's clearance

I also noticed you've documented several sign-in exceptions near the loading dock. We'll discuss protocol reinforcement at our Friday meeting.

Please have updated logs on my desk by end of week.

Best,
Patricia Chen
Ext. 4721

title: Patch: f001-patch-obj-001-2
content:
**INTEROFFICE MEMORANDUM**

TO: Building Security Division
FROM: Tom Hartley, Mailroom Supervisor
DATE: November 14, 2024
RE: Delivery Log Discrepancies and Access Protocol Concerns

---

I am writing to report several irregular patterns I've observed during my tenure as mailroom supervisor that require immediate attention from the Security Department.

**DELIVERY ANOMALIES:**

Over the past six weeks, I have processed package deliveries addressed to "Executive Operations, Floor 62" and "Research Division, Floor 68" that do not correspond to any departments listed in our current facility directory. These shipments arrive bi-weekly from vendors not registered in our standard procurement channels. When I cross-referenced with department heads, none claimed knowledge of these deliveries.

**ACCESS PROTOCOL CONCERNS:**

More concerning is a pattern I've noticed regarding Colonel Dragunov (Consultant, Special Projects). On approximately twelve occasions, Colonel Dragunov has entered the building through the main lobby during my shifts without signing in at the security desk. When I mentioned this to Officer Chen last week, she indicated that Colonel Dragunov operates under a security_override authorization that exempts him from standard sign-in procedures—though she could not provide documentation of this override in our system.

I find the dragunov_no_signin protocol highly irregular. No other personnel, regardless of clearance level, bypass the sign-in book. This represents a significant departure from our access control standards outlined in Policy 4.2.

**ADDITIONAL NOTE:**

A crumpled note was found in the mailroom on November 12th referencing "Locker 7B, Floor 3" as a dead drop location. The note was partially illegible but appeared to be in Colonel Dragunov's handwriting.

I request clarification on these matters.

Respectfully,
Tom Hartley

title: Patch: f001-patch-obj-001-3
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER**
**INTERDEPARTMENTAL MEMORANDUM**

---

**TO:** All Mailroom Staff
**FROM:** Tom Hartley, Mailroom Supervisor
**DATE:** November 14, 2024
**RE:** Locker Maintenance & Package Routing Procedures

---

**URGENT: Floor 3 Locker Audit**

Please be advised that we will be conducting a routine maintenance inspection of all mailroom lockers on **floor 3** this Friday, November 17th, beginning at 2:00 PM. This includes a full inventory of **locker 7B**, which has not been accessed or cleared since September.

Staff should retrieve any personal items stored in **floor 3** lockers prior to this date.

**Package Routing Clarification**

I have noticed several irregularities in our delivery logs regarding packages destined for floors 60 and above. Effective immediately, all deliveries to upper floors must include:
- Department authorization code
- Recipient name and extension
- Contents declaration

Do NOT process any package for floors 60+ without proper documentation. This prevents confusion and ensures accountability.

**Note to All Staff**

A crumpled note was discovered yesterday between sorted parcels containing unclear references to a **dead drop** arrangement. This is a serious concern. Any information regarding unauthorized package handling, bypass of the sign-in book, or suspicious delivery patterns must be reported directly to myself or building security immediately.

Our procedures exist to maintain the integrity of Pinnacle Tower operations.

Thank you,

**Tom Hartley**
Mailroom Supervisor, Pinnacle Tower

title: Patch: f001-patch-obj-001-1
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER FACILITIES MANAGEMENT**
**INTERDEPARTMENTAL MEMORANDUM**

---

**TO:** Tom Hartley, Mailroom Supervisor
**FROM:** Patricia Chen, Compliance & Logistics
**DATE:** March 14, 2024
**RE:** Delivery Log Audit & Vendor Verification Protocol Update
**PRIORITY:** HIGH

---

**PURPOSE**

Following our Q1 audit of mail operations, we've identified discrepancies in package routing that require immediate attention and documentation.

**FINDINGS**

Our review of delivery logs for January through February reveals an unusual volume of shipments directed to **floors 60 and above**. These packages originate from vendors not appearing on our approved supplier roster.

Specifically, we've noted recurring deliveries from **Lazarus Medical** (vendor registration pending verification) addressed to floor 62, receiving suite 6210. Cross-referencing our departmental directory shows no active projects or procurement orders from this shipper matching those floor allocations.

**REQUIRED ACTIONS**

1. Compile all incoming manifests for floors 60+ from the past 90 days
2. Flag any shipments from non-approved vendors for secondary review
3. Require sender verification documentation before processing future deliveries to upper levels
4. Update sign-in procedures to log all personnel accessing restricted zones

**NEXT STEPS**

Compliance will be conducting facility walk-throughs this week. Please ensure all delivery logs are accessible and current.

Thank you for your cooperation in maintaining Pinnacle Tower's security protocols.

---

**Patricia Chen**
*Compliance & Logistics Director*
*Pinnacle Tower Management*

title: Patch: f001-patch-obj-001-3
content:
**PINNACLE TOWER**
**FACILITIES MANAGEMENT DIVISION**

---

**MEMORANDUM**

**TO:** All Mailroom Personnel
**FROM:** Patricia Chen, Mailroom Supervisor
**DATE:** March 14, 2024
**RE:** Locker Audit & Security Protocol Reminder

---

During routine inventory this morning, I discovered an unmarked note wedged between parcels in sorting bin C-7. The note references "locker_7b" and contains concerning language about a "dead_drop" scheduled for later this week. While the handwriting is unclear, the mention of Floor 3 storage facilities suggests this may relate to our facilities expansion project.

**IMMEDIATE ACTIONS REQUIRED:**

1. Security will conduct an inspection of locker_7b on floor_3 this afternoon. All floor_3 storage lockers are to remain locked and undisturbed until completion of this audit.

2. Tom Hartley has been asked to review his delivery log for any packages routed to executive floors (60+) that lack corresponding department requisition forms. Discrepancies have been noted and are being forwarded to management.

3. All personnel must sign in at the main desk. There are no exceptions to this policy, regardless of clearance level.

The crumpled note has been secured and forwarded to Building Security. If anyone has information regarding unauthorized locker usage or suspicious package activity, please report directly to my office.

**Patricia Chen**
Mailroom Supervisor
Ext. 4421
